caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Dominica Today
caribbean.paragraph: Dominica is experiencing strong tropical moisture with sustained winds up to 15 kt and wave heights reaching 4.8 ft from an ESE swell direction. Rain probability is 90%, creating challenging conditions for marine and port operations, while St. Maarten sees winds increasing to 21 kt with less than 10% rain probability.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rainfall and Moderate Winds Impact Istanbul Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Istanbul is experiencing heavy rain with a 98% rain probability accompanied by moderate winds reaching 14 kt and wave heights up to 2.2 ft from the southwest. Haifa is also seeing moderate winds of 15 kt with less than 10% rain probability, keeping conditions relatively calmer there.
